title: LEFT OUTER JOIN with constants returns errors
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table1 (id INT, value VARCHAR(50));
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (id INT, description TEXT, amount DECIMAL(10, 2));
INSERT INTO test_table2 (id, description, amount) VALUES (1, 'desc1', 100.00), (2, 'desc2', NULL);
SELECT a.id, a.value, b.c FROM test_table1 a LEFT JOIN (SELECT 1 AS c) b ON a.id = b.c;
key_bug_features: LEFT OUTER JOIN with constants causes errors
